title: Radiation
description: Bananas emit a small amount of radiation due to their potassium. But they are completely harmless; in fact, it would take absurd circumstances for them to become dangerous. But let’s go bananas to explore it!

title: Rhythm
description: Why we find satisfaction in sound patterns? And anyway, how our brains decode sound waves into music on real time?. Dive with me into the science of rhythm.

title: Randomness
description: Randomness is probably more embeded in to our daily lives than you might think. Explore with me some of the weird ways randomness shows up around us.
